ballad.selog
类 LogSupport

java.lang.Object
  ballad.selog.LogSupport

public class LogSupport
extends java.lang.Object

SimplE LOG (SELOG) -- A lightweight log tool for Java.
The global values doing support.

版本：
0.1 2011/11/17
作者：
Ballad
